name: Mysterious Hunter (Earth-Ruin)
description:
He's a 6'4 man with a gray winter coat, black cargo pants, black boots and black gloves with a full face gas mask on.
He carries a bowie knife, multiple throwing knives, a heavy revolver and and a general medkit.
He's a expert hunter and a x-soldier and knows basic and advanced forms of self defense along with vital areas in the human and multiple animals
creator: ThePillowGirl
